description: Bump bot for the certified-frontier ledger (platform ADR-0001). One PR per
component release moving exactly one pin, so a red certification attributes
to a single version delta. Patch bumps auto-merge on green; minor/major
runs — semver only decides ceremony, never whether to test.
//: NEVER batch releases — batching destroys failure attribution (ADR-0001).

packageRules.description: Patch (and digest-only) bumps auto-merge on green certification.
Minor/major bumps require human review; certification still runs.
Submodule pins — one PR each, never grouped.

customManagers.description: Track pinned component image digests in composition.lock.json (once components publish artifacts). Version+digest are the ledger's evidence.
